subcategory: scroll-triggered navbar with animated popup menu
use_cases: Site-wide navigation on modern landing pages with scroll-triggered behavior
Single-page application navigation that appears on scroll with animated menu popup
Portfolio or personal website navigation with icon-based menu items
Dashboard or app navigation with smooth scroll detection and hamburger menu
Multi-section website navigation with hover effects on menu items
ai_summary: A scroll-triggered navigation bar component featuring smooth Framer Motion animations, an animated popup menu with staggered item reveals, and icon-based navigation items. The navbar responds to scroll position changes (appearing after 100px scroll) and includes a responsive hamburger menu toggle for mobile devices with hover state tracking on menu items.
